# ClinicOS Design Tokens
<!-- Auto-generated by clinicos-styler bootstrap — 2026-05-07 -->
<!-- Source: static/css/main.css (6479 lines) -->
<!-- Do NOT edit manually unless adding a new token; sync changes back here -->

---

## § Themes

ClinicOS uses a **warm sepia/parchment** palette — NOT the neutral grey described in system prompt defaults. Both themes share a brown-amber aesthetic. The navbar and dock are always dark brown (`#2e1e0c`) regardless of theme.

### Dark Theme (default — `:root`)

| Token | Value | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `--bg` | `#1a1612` | Page background (warm dark brown) |
| `--bg-2` | `#211d18` | Card / panel background |
| `--bg-3` | `#2a2520` | Input / sub-surface background |
| `--bg-input` | `#302b25` | Form input fill (darkest surface) |
| `--border` | `#3d3630` | Default border |
| `--border-light` | `#4e4640` | Hover / focus / accent border |
| `--text` | `#ede8e2` | Primary text |
| `--text-muted` | `#9a8f85` | Secondary / label text (also `--muted`) |
| `--text-dim` | `#5e5650` | Placeholder / disabled text (also `--dim`) |
| `--muted` | `#9a8f85` | Alias for `--text-muted` |
| `--dim` | `#5e5650` | Alias for `--text-dim` |
| `--primary` | `#e8e0d8` | Primary action color (used as btn bg-inv) |
| `--primary-hover` | `#f5f0eb` | Primary hover |
| `--success` | `#c8b49a` | Success tint (warm beige, not green) |
| `--danger` | `#f87171` | Error / danger red |
| `--warning` | `#fbbf24` | Warning amber |

### Light Theme (`html.light`)

| Token | Value | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `--bg` | `#ede7de` | Page background (warm cream) |
| `--bg-2` | `#e4ddd4` | Card background |
| `--bg-3` | `#dbd3ca` | Sub-surface |
| `--bg-input` | `#d2cabf` | Input fill |
| `--border` | `#c2a98a` | Default border (warm tan) |
| `--border-light` | `#a8906e` | Accent border |
| `--text` | `#1a1410` | Primary text |
| `--text-muted` | `#6b5f55` | Secondary text (also `--muted`) |
| `--text-dim` | `#a89e94` | Dim text (also `--dim`) |
| `--muted` | `#6b5f55` | Alias |
| `--dim` | `#a89e94` | Alias |
| `--primary` | `#2a1f16` | Primary (inverted, dark) |
| `--primary-hover` | `#0f0a06` | Primary hover |
| *(danger/warning/success unchanged)* | | Inherited from `:root` |

### Fixed / Theme-independent Colors

| Color | Value | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| `#2e1e0c` | Dark brown | Navbar bg, dock bg, tooltips — always dark |
| `#f0e6d4` | Warm white | Navbar brand text (dark theme) |
| `#fff8f0` | Near white | Navbar brand hover (dark theme) |
| `#ddd0be` | Tan | Dock tooltip text, dock hover color, light theme navbar brand hover |
| `#c4b49e` | Warm grey | Navbar icon / settings link (dark theme) |
| `#f2e8d8` | Warm white | Navbar icon hover (dark theme) |
| `#c8b8a2` | Tan | Light theme navbar icon |
| `#f87171` | Red | Danger / logout button color |
| `#fca5a5` | Light red | Logout hover (light theme) |
| `#a0886a` | Brown | Dock item icon color (both themes) |
| `#ede4d6` | Cream | Dock active item text |
| `#6b4a28` | Deep brown | Pagination active bg, stripe accent, month chip active |
| `#e8d5bc` | Warm beige | Pagination active text |
| `#f5ead8` | Light cream | Light theme pagination active text |
| `#c4b09a` | Warm tan | Badge text (dark theme, universal badge palette) |
| `#1a1208` | Near black | Badge text (light theme override) |
| `#22c55e` | Green | `.appt-row--serving` border tint |
| `#b91c1c` | Dark red | Emergency toggle active (light theme) |
| `#ef4444` | Medium red | btn-danger hover, action danger buttons |
| `#c8b49a` | Warm beige | Alert success text, bill discount row |

## § Shadows & Glows

| Token | Value | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `--shadow` | `0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)` | Subtle card shadow (dark) |
| `--shadow` (light) | `0 2px 8px rgba(60,40,20,0.08)` | Subtle card shadow (light) |
| `--shadow-md` | `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.65)` | Modal / deeper shadow (dark) |
| `--shadow-md` (light) | `0 8px 32px rgba(60,40,20,0.12)` | (light) |
| `--glow` | `0 0 24px rgba(255,240,220,0.04), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)` | Card resting glow (dark) |
| `--glow` (light) | `0 0 0 1px rgba(60,40,20,0.06), 0 2px 8px rgba(60,40,20,0.06)` | Card resting glow (light) |
| `--glow-hover` | `0 0 40px rgba(255,240,220,0.07), 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)` | Card hover glow (dark) |
| `--glow-hover` (light) | `0 0 0 1px rgba(60,40,20,0.10), 0 6px 20px rgba(60,40,20,0.10)` | (light) |
| `--glow-btn` | `0 0 18px rgba(255,240,220,0.10)` | Button resting glow |
| `--glow-btn` (light) | `0 2px 8px rgba(60,40,20,0.12)` | (light) |
| `--glow-btn-hover` | `0 0 28px rgba(255,240,220,0.18)` | Button hover glow |
| `--glow-btn-hover` (light) | `0 4px 16px rgba(60,40,20,0.20)` | (light) |
| Dock shadow | `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 0 0 0.5px rgba(200,170,130,0.08)` | Hard-coded on `.dash-dock` |
| Tooltip shadow | `0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.30)` | `.dock-tooltip` |
| Navbar shadow | `0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.20)` | `.navbar` |
| Today ring glow | `0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,0.18), 0 0 18px rgba(255,255,255,0.07)` | `.cal-day--today .cal-day-num` |
| Today ring glow (light) | `0 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.10), 0 0 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)` | `.cal-day--today .cal-day-num` |
| Modal box shadow | `0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)` | `.modal-box`, `.appt-card-container` |
| PIN dialog shadow | `0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.04), 0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.7)` | `.pin-dialog` |
| Emergency visit glow | `0 0 24px rgba(248,113,113,0.12)` | `.visit-serving-card.visit-emergency` |
| Emergency toggle glow | `0 0 14px rgba(248,113,113,0.18)` | `.btn-emergency-toggle.active` |

## § Border Radii

| Token | Value | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| `--radius-sm` | `10px` | Inputs, buttons, badges, small elements |
| `--radius` | `20px` | Cards, sections, queue cards |
| `--radius-lg` | `28px` | Not used in current CSS (reserved) |
| `8px` | Hard-coded | `.btn-xs`, `.input-sm`, `.blocked-row`, `.booking-link-box`, many tooltips |
| `7px` | Hard-coded | `.btn-icon-remove` |
| `6px` | Hard-coded | `.modal-close`, `.patient-pin-btn`, `.file-modal-close` |
| `5px` | Hard-coded | `.expense-cat-badge` |
| `4px` | Hard-coded | `.expense-del-btn`, `.appt-row--striped::before` |
| `14px` | Hard-coded | `.ac-info-grid`, `.ac-bottom-card`, `.acm-quickadd` |
| `18px` | Hard-coded | `.pin-dialog` |
| `22px` | Hard-coded | `.dash-dock` |
| `50%` | Hard-coded | Dots, avatar circles, toggle thumb |
| `100px` | Hard-coded | `.badge` (pill shape), toggle track |
| `999px` | Hard-coded | Note file chips (full pill) |
| `20px` | Hard-coded | `.appt-group-count`, `.ac-status-badge`, `.sub-status-badge`, `.txn-month-chip` |

## § Spacing (Margin / Padding)

### Layout Spacing

| Context | Value | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `.main-content` padding | `32px 60px` (top: `calc(52px + 28px)`) | Full-width layout, equal side gaps |
| `.navbar` height | `52px` | Fixed top navbar |
| `.navbar` padding | `0 32px` | |
| `.page-header` margin-bottom | `28px` | |
| Stats row gap | `12px` | |
| Stats row margin-bottom | `32px` | |
| Card padding | `24px` | `.card` |
| Settings card padding | `24px 28px` | `.settings-card` |
| Queue/Schedule card padding | `20px 24px` | `.queue-section`, `.schedule-section` |
| Income KPI card padding | `22px 24px` | `.income-kpi-card` |
| Brand panel padding | `48px 36px` | `.appt-brand-panel` |
| Auth brand padding | `60px 88px` | |
| Auth panel padding | `40px 72px` | |

### Form Spacing

| Context | Value |
|---|---|
| `.form-group` margin-bottom | `16px` |
| Form input padding | `11px 14px` |
| Input-sm padding | `8px 10px` |
| `.btn` padding | `11px 20px` |
| `.btn-sm` padding | `11px 20px` |
| `.btn-xs` padding | `5px 12px` (or `4px 9px` override) |
| `.btn-primary` padding | `13px` |
| Section header margin-bottom | `12px` |

### Component Spacing

| Context | Value |
|---|---|
| Appointment row padding | `15px 18px` |
| Patient row padding | `14px 16px` |
| Schedule section header padding-bottom | `16px` |
| Calendar day min-height | `88px` |
| Calendar day padding | `10px 12px` |
| Dock padding | `14px 8px` |
| Dock item size | `48px × 48px` |
| Dock item border-radius | `14px` |
| PIN dialog width | `220px` |

## § Typography

### Font Families

| Family | Weight(s) | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| `'Playfair Display'`, Georgia, serif | 700, 900 | Logo, headings, page titles, stat values, token numbers, bill amounts, plan names, modal titles |
| `'Inter'`, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif | 400, 500, 600 | All body text, labels, inputs, buttons |
| `'Courier New'`, monospace | — | `.booking-link-box` (booking URL display) |

### Font Sizes

| Size | Usage |
|---|---|
| `88px` | `.brand-title` (auth page logo) |
| `56px` | `.brand-title` responsive (≤900px) |
| `44px` | `.brand-title` responsive (≤480px) |
| `40px` | `.stat-value` (dashboard stat numbers) |
| `42px` | `.plan-price` |
| `clamp(36px, 4vw, 62px)` | `.appt-brand-title` |
| `32px` | `.report-np-value` |
| `28px` | `.pub-clinic-name`, `.plan-name`, `.sub-plan-price` |
| `26px` | `.page-title` |
| `22px` | `.auth-card-title`, `.info-section-title`, `.dash-greeting` |
| `20px` | `.stat-value--sm`, `.pub-confirm-title` |
| `18px` | `.pub-card-title`, `.brand-tagline`, `.file-modal-title`, `.acm-title` |
| `2rem` (≈32px) | `.dash-income-amount` |
| `2.4rem` (≈38px) | `.visit-token` |
| `1.75rem` | `.income-kpi-amount` |
| `1.5rem` | `.expense-kpi-val` |
| `1.4rem` | `.bill-total-amount`, `.acm-total-amount` |
| `1.15rem` | `.modal-title` |
| `1.1rem` | `.visit-token-sm`, `.expense-month-label` |
| `1.05rem` | `.appt-token-num`, `.bill-history-amount`, `.catalog-price`, `.acm-total-amount` |
| `1rem` | `.pending-amount`, `.expense-amount`, `.txn-amount`, `.recurring-amount` |
| `0.95rem` | `.visit-name`, `.catalog-price` |
| `0.85rem` | `.visit-menu-item`, `.txn-token` |
| `0.78rem` | `.visit-meta` |
| `0.72rem` | `.queue-block-label`, `.schedule-label` |
| `15px` | Body base, `.settings-card-title`, `.card-title`, `.billing-expired-title` |
| `14px` | Standard content text, inputs, `.blocked-date`, `.patient-name` |
| `13px` | Secondary content, most `.btn-sm`, badges, muted info |
| `12px` | Small labels, `.brand-feature`, `.pub-address` |
| `11px` | Uppercase section labels, stat labels, badge channel text |
| `10px` | Smallest labels — `.badge-channel`, `.ac-col-title`, `.acm-label`, `.expense-cat-badge` |

---

## § Transitions & Animations

| Token / Name | Value | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| `--transition-pop` | `transform 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1), box-shadow 0.22s ease` | Card/button pop-on-hover (spring easing) |
| Link color | `color 0.15s` | All `<a>` links |
| Input border | `border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s` | `.form-group input/select/textarea` |
| Button bg | `background 0.15s` | Most secondary buttons |
| Dock slide | `transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94), opacity 0.25s ease` | Dock reveal |
| Dock item hover | Inherits `--transition-pop` + `background 0.15s, color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s` | |
| Tooltip fade | `opacity 0.12s ease` (delay `0.18s`) | `[data-tip]::after` |
| Dock tooltip | `opacity 0.14s ease, transform 0.14s ease` | |
| Bar chart fill | `width 0.4s ease` | `.report-type-bar`, `.income-bar-fill` |
| Page slide right | `@keyframes pageSlideInRight` — `translateX(52px)→0` — `0.27s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94)` | `.page-slide-right` |
| Page slide left | `@keyframes pageSlideInLeft` — `translateX(-52px)→0` — same easing | `.page-slide-left` |
| Walk-in panel reveal | `@keyframes slideDown` — `translateY(-8px)→0` — `0.15s ease` | `.walkin-panel` |
| Dashboard previous toggle | `@keyframes slideDown` — `translateY(-6px)→0` — `0.2s ease` | `.dash-prev-list--open` |
| Emergency pulse | `@keyframes pulse-emergency` — `box-shadow 0→4px rgba(248,113,113)` — `2s infinite` | `.badge--emergency` |
| PIN blur | `filter 0.2s ease` | `.pin-active .navbar/.main-content` |
| Appointment card overlay | `opacity 0.22s ease` | `.appt-card-overlay` |
| Appointment card slide in | `transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)` | `.appt-card-container` — `translateY(16px) scale(0.97)→identity` |

---

## § Z-Index Layers

| Value | Context |
|---|---|
| `200` | `.navbar`, `.dock-zone`, tooltip `[data-tip]::after` |
| `210` | `.dock-tooltip` |
| `60` | Slot dropdown |
| `100` | Visit dropdown menu |
| `400` | File upload modal overlay |
| `1000` | `.modal-backdrop`, `.appt-card-overlay` |
| `1100` | `.ac-bill-modal-wrap` (above card overlay) |
| `9999` | `.pin-overlay` (above everything) |

---

## § Badge System

All badges use a **unified warm beige palette** in dark mode, with a dark text override in light mode.

### Standard Badge (`.badge`)

```css
background: rgba(200, 175, 145, 0.14);
color: #c4b09a;
border: 1px solid rgba(200, 175, 145, 0.22);
border-radius: 100px;
padding: 3px 10px;
font-size: 11px;
```

Light theme override: `background: rgba(175,145,105,0.16); color: #1a1208; border-color: rgba(155,125,85,0.28)`

### Channel Badges (`.badge-channel`)
All channel + status variants share the same beige palette above.
Classes: `--walkin`, `--staff`, `--doctor`, `--patient`, `--scheduled`, `--completed`, `--cancelled`, `--no_show`, `--in_queue`, `--serving`, `--billing_pending`, `--billing`, `--emergency`

### Sub-status Badges (`.sub-status-badge`)
`--trial`, `--solo`, `--basic`, `--pro`, `--expired` — same beige palette

### Pagination Active (`.pt-btn--active`, `.txn-month-chip--active`)
`background: #6b4a28; color: #e8d5bc; border-color: #6b4a28`

---

## § Component Patterns

### Card Hover Pop
```css
transition: var(--transition-pop);
/* hover: */
transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.01);
box-shadow: var(--glow-hover);
```
Variations: `-2px scale(1.005)` (rows), `-4px scale(1.03)` (quick-cards), `-2px scale(1.02)` (stat-cards)

### Form Focus Ring
```css
border-color: var(--primary);
box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
/* Light: box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); */
```

### Select Dropdown Arrow (SVG background-image)
Stroke color `#555555`, size `12×7`, path `M1 1l5 5 5-5`

### Paper Grain Texture
SVG `feTurbulence` noise applied as `background-image` on `body`. Dark theme uses `rgba(0.55, 0.42, 0.30, 0.12)` grain, light uses `rgba(0.55, 0.40, 0.25, 0.55)`.

---

## § Responsive Breakpoints

| Breakpoint | What changes |
|---|---|
| `≤1100px` | Stats row → 3 cols; income KPI → 2 cols |
| `≤1024px` | New appt brand panel hidden; split → 1 col |
| `≤960px` | *(noted in CLAUDE.md for brand panel)* |
| `≤900px` | Auth → 1 col; stats/quick-actions → 2 cols; settings form → 1 col; schedule responsive; dash grid → 1 col; income grids → 1 col; expense grid → 1 col |
| `≤800px` | Appointment split grid → 1 col |
| `≤768px` | Dock hidden; **mobile bottom nav bar shown**; `main-content` padding reduced to `16px`; billing plans → 1 col; admin table cols truncated; `overflow-x: hidden` on html/body |
| `≤760px` | Bill detail grid → 1 col; appointment card info grid → 1 col |
| `≤700px` | Sub plan rows → column; sub-features-grid → 1 col |
| `≤640px` | Stats → 2 cols; income KPI → 1 col; expense KPI → 1 col; add expense → 1 col; edit grid → 1 col; patients list columns hidden; appt-split → 1 col; reports → 1 col; appt-card overlay full-width slide-up; walkin-form fields stack |
| `≤600px` | Page headers stack; patient detail actions wrap; appt detail/controls stack; modals full-width |
| `≤480px` | Auth title smaller; form-row → 1 col; schedule rows flex-wrap; stats → 1 col (≤400px); landing buttons full-width |
| `≤400px` | Landing page tiny-phone: 14px side padding, all grids 1 col, hero title 26px |

## § Mobile Bottom Navigation

`.mobile-nav` — shown at `≤768px`, hidden on desktop. Dark brown `#2e1e0c` to match navbar.
- Height: `56px` + `env(safe-area-inset-bottom)` padding (iPhone notch safe)
- Items: Dashboard, Queue, Patients, Calendar, More (→ income)
- `.mobile-nav-item--active`: color `#ede4d6`; icon color `#c9b99a`
- Z-index: `199` (below navbar `200`, above content)

---

## § Navbar

Always dark (`background: #2e1e0c`), fixed at top, `height: 52px`, `z-index: 200`.
- Brand: `Playfair Display 20px/700`, warm amber text-shadow glow
- Controls: Settings link, theme toggle (32×32px), logout button (32×32px)
- No light theme override — navbar stays dark brown in both themes

---

## § Dock

Always dark (`background: #2e1e0c`), `border-radius: 22px`, left-edge auto-hide.
- Reveals on hover within 10px of left edge via `.dock-zone` trigger strip
- Items: `48×48px`, `border-radius: 14px`
- Active: `background: rgba(200,170,130,0.22); border-color: rgba(200,170,130,0.40); color: #ede4d6`
- Tooltips: same dark brown bg, slide in from right, `z-index: 210`
- Hidden on `≤768px`

---

## § PIN Overlay

- `.pin-overlay` backdrop: `rgba(8,8,8,0.45)` + `backdrop-filter: blur(2px)`, `z-index: 9999`
- `.pin-dialog`: `rgba(14,14,14,0.92)` bg, `border-radius: 18px`, always dark (ignores theme)
- Active pages: `filter: blur(14px) brightness(0.55)` on navbar and main-content

---
